summary: Adds a retry wrapper comment and updates the config type. The change is focused and minimal.

findings.title: timeout type changed from number to number | string
findings.description: Changing `timeout` from `number` to `number | string` widens the type. Callers that assumed a number will now need coercion.
findings.recommendation: Keep `timeout: number` and add a `parseTimeout` helper at the edge that coerces string inputs.
findings.reasoning: Every call site that does arithmetic on `timeout` now type-errors or silently coerces; the diff widens the type without updating those callers.

findings.title: Vague comment: 'retry wrapper'
findings.description: The comment `// retry wrapper` doesn't explain what is wrapped or why.
findings.reasoning: A future reader can't tell from the comment what the wrapper retries or under what conditions; the retry logic is several lines above.

findings.title: __all__ should include all public names
findings.description: If `LegacyClient` is still part of the public API, it should be in `__all__`. If not, remove the import.
findings.reasoning: The import is present but absent from `__all__`, so `from pkg import *` won't export it — a likely oversight given it's imported at the package root.

findings.title: This line is NOT in the diff — should be demoted
findings.description: This finding anchors to a line that is not in the diff. The inline command must demote it to the summary.
findings.reasoning: The anchored line falls outside every diff hunk, so it cannot be posted as an inline comment and must appear in the strays section instead.
